title: Data Stream Rotation
description: Rotate an array by k positions to the right
story: The data stream from Sector 7 is corrupted. You need to realign the temporal markers by rotating the sequence. The Megacorp's clock is ticking.
mission: Rotate the data stream to restore temporal alignment.
input_spec:
First line: space-separated integers
Second line: integer k
output_spec: Space-separated integers rotated by k positions

hints.content: Consider using modulo to handle k > length
Split array at rotation point and swap segments
Remember that rotating by length returns original
